sqlMap.select: select * from StateCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
select CoverageKey, StateCode from StateCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.update:
update StateCoverage set
where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.delete: delete from StateCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
delete from StateCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.select: select CoverageKey, StateCode from StateCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
select CoverageKey, StateCode from StateCoverage where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and StateCode = #StateCode#
